## New Project Submission

### Checklist

- [ ] Added YAML file to `src/data/projects/`
- [ ] Filename matches project slug (e.g., `my-project.yml`)
- [ ] All required fields are filled in
- [ ] Project has a public repo or website
- [ ] Project is related to the OpenClaw ecosystem
- [ ] Not a duplicate of an existing entry
